name: claude_skills
description: A comprehensive collection of 232+ skills and agent plugins designed to extend the capabilities of coding assistants such as Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 other coding agents, covering domains including engineering, marketing, product development, compliance, and C-level advisory.

inputs.name: code_agent
inputs.description: The target coding agent to which the plugin or skill will be applied or integrated (e.g., Claude Code, Codex).

inputs.name: task_description
inputs.description: A description of the task or problem to be solved using the skill or plugin.

inputs.name: domain_context
inputs.description: Optional domain-specific context such as engineering, marketing, product, compliance, or executive-level advisory to tailor the skill application.

inputs.name: input_data
inputs.description: Relevant input data such as code snippets, queries, marketing materials, compliance documents, or product requirements, depending on the skill invoked.

outputs.name: skill_output
outputs.description: The result generated by the skill or plugin such as code completions, marketing strategies, product plans, compliance checks, or advisory notes.

outputs.name: execution_report
outputs.description: A summary or detailed report of the skill execution, including success status and any relevant output metadata.

steps: Identify the target coding agent for the skill or plugin deployment.
Provide a clear task description including domain context to tailor the skill.
Input relevant data such as code snippets or documents as required by the skill.
Invoke the selected skill or plugin within the agent environment.
Process the input data according to specialized workflows adapted to the domain.
Generate output results including code, reports, or strategic advice.
Review and integrate outputs into broader workflows or projects.
use_cases: Enhancing code generation and completion for software engineering teams.
Automating marketing content creation and analysis using AI agents.
Supporting product management with AI-driven planning and insights.
Conducting compliance audits and generating advisory documentation.
Providing C-level executives with AI-generated strategic recommendations.
patterns: Agent plugin integration across multiple AI coding platforms
Reusable coding, marketing, product, compliance, and advisory workflows
Composable skill orchestration for complex multi-agent scenarios

prompt_templates.name: code_generation_prompt
marketing_strategy_prompt
product_planning_prompt
compliance_check_prompt
executive_advisory_prompt
